_comment: Multi-family real-LLM ladder config for run_multifamily_ladder.py. Each entry: LM Studio model key + metadata (active_b/total_b in billions; MoE/MatFormer have active<<total). The set forms a matched 3-tier x 3-family grid so the 'active params, not total' effect can be tested ACROSS families: (a) low-active MoE ~2.4-4B {deepseek, qwen, gemma}, (b) dense 7-9B {mistral, llama, qwen}, (c) dense 24-27B {mistral, qwen, gemma}. Scope is multi-FAMILY open-weights (Q4_K_M, one 24GB GPU), NOT multi-VENDOR frontier (Claude/GPT/Gemini needs API; future work). Results are logged with model id+prompt_digest+date and are NOT part of `make repro` (provider nondeterminism).
_key_note: On-disk keys confirmed from `lms ls`: meta-llama-3.1-8b-instruct, mistral-7b-instruct-v0.3, mistral-small-24b-instruct-2501. gemma-2-27b-it and deepseek-v2-lite-chat downloads in progress; verify exact keys with `lms ls` before running. DeepSeek is Q4_K_S (second-state repo); all others Q4_K_M.
_quantization: Q4_K_M for all except deepseek-v2-lite-chat (Q4_K_S, only variant resolvable via a non-gated repo); noted per-entry where it differs.

models.note: registered by clearing stale LM Studio download-job records (single-downloads-info.json / download-jobs-info.json) + removing .part, then restart-rescan; the CLI importer could not force a reindex headless

registered by clearing stale LM Studio download-job records (single-downloads-info.json / download-jobs-info.json) + removing .part, then restart-rescan; the CLI importer could not force a reindex headless

_status: 10 of 10 models registered and evaluated (see results/MULTIFAMILY_LADDER.md). gemma-2-27b-it (high-tier 3rd family) and deepseek-v2-lite-chat (low-active 3rd family) were registered by clearing stale download-job records + .part then restart-rescan; the full 3-tier x 3-family grid is now complete.
